name: ping
description: Send ICMP echo requests to a network host to test connectivity and measure round-trip time

options.label: Count
options.description: Stop after sending the specified number of echo requests

options.label: Interval (seconds)
options.description: Wait the specified number of seconds between sending each packet

validation.message: Interval must be at least 0.1 seconds

options.label: Timeout (seconds)
options.description: Time to wait for a response before considering the packet lost

validation.message: Timeout must be at least 1 second

positionalArgs.label: Host
positionalArgs.description: Hostname or IP address to ping

examples.label: Ping with custom interval and timeout
Ping with fast interval for rapid testing
Ping with extended timeout for slow networks
